headline: Clorox’s 5.5% Yield Is a Safe-Haven Sending Retirees Sprinting Back to This 51-Year Dividend Aristocrat
summary: Few consumer staples have been treated as roughly by the higher-for-longer rate regime as Clorox (NYSE:CLX). The stock sits down 18.6% over the past year, pushing the yield to a level rarely seen for a household-name aristocrat. With Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) projecting the Fed to cut another 50 basis points to 3-3.25% in 2026, income ...
